verses.arabicText: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ مِّنْ حَمَإٍۢ مَّسْنُونٍۢ
verses.translationText: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌۭ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled.

verses.arabicText: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translationText: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.translationText: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

verses.arabicText: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
verses.translationText: Until the Day of the time well-known."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.translationText: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all

verses.arabicText: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.translationText: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ عِبَادِى لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
verses.translationText: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.

verses.arabicText: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.translationText: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.

verses.arabicText: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَٰبٍۢ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌۭ مَّقْسُومٌ
verses.translationText: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated."

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.translationText: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs.

verses.arabicText: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.translationText: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]."

verses.arabicText: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.translationText: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other.

verses.arabicText: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌۭ وَمَا هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
verses.translationText: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed.

verses.arabicText: ۞ نَبِّئْ عِبَادِىٓ أَنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.translationText: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِى هُوَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ٱلْأَلِيمُ
verses.translationText: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment.

verses.arabicText: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَن ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.translationText: And inform them about the guests of Abraham,
